productDisplayName: Spykar Men Ranger Purple-Black Stripe White Shirts
description: Composition White shirt with purple and navy blue vertical stripes made of 100% cotton, with full hand sleeves, front buttoned placket with brand embroidery near the left chest placket, tipped collar and curved hemline Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Stylish to the hilt, this white with navy blue and purple striped shirt from spykar is a great addition to your wardrobe. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and brown suede shoes to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
